items.title: hub:wanted — Public landing page v1 (brand + SN74 proof + CTAs)
items.body:
## Goal
Ship a public landing page at `/` (or dedicated marketing route) that explains Gittensor Hub, shows live SN74 proof, and CTAs to sign-in / docs / wanted board.

## Acceptance
- Chromeless public route (no OAuth wall)
- Brand-first hero; one CTA group
- Link to changelog + wanted issues
- Works on mobile + desktop

## Anti-slop
No generic AI purple theme. Match hub visual language or a deliberate branded landing system.

items.title: hub:wanted — Weekly /changelog page + first ship note
items.body:
## Goal
Add `/changelog` listing weekly ship notes (markdown or structured data).

## Acceptance
- Public route
- At least one real entry describing recent work
- Documented how maintainers add the next weekly note

items.title: hub:wanted — Public /status page for poller freshness
items.body:
## Goal
Public status page showing poller / cache freshness (repos cached, last fetch, recent errors).

## Acceptance
- Uses existing poller-status data (or a public API wrapper)
- Clear healthy / degraded presentation
- Linked from docs or landing

items.title: hub:wanted — Docs cover Miners, Maintainers, and anti-slop
items.body:
## Goal
Extend in-app `/docs` (and README pointers) so Miners + Maintainers views and anti-slop contribution rules are documented.

## Acceptance
- New doc sections for Miners and Maintainers
- Anti-slop / hub:wanted rules summarized with links to CONTRIBUTING
- Stack versions say Next 16 / React 19

items.title: hub:wanted — My Work cockpit for signed-in GitHub user
items.body:
## Goal
One page (`/my-work`) showing the signed-in user's open issues/PRs on this repo (and later Hub Score placeholder).

## Acceptance
- Auth-gated
- Lists user's open PRs/issues against MkDev11/gittensor-hub
- Empty state points at hub:wanted board

items.title: hub:wanted — Gittensor explainer chatbot MVP (docs RAG)
items.body:
## Goal
Retrieval-only chatbot over committed docs (allocator math, how to mine, hub guides). Cite sources; never invent emission figures.

## Acceptance
- `/chat` (public or signed-in — document choice)
- Answers “how do SN74 emissions split?” with citations
- Clear “not financial advice / not a score oracle” disclaimer

items.title: hub:wanted — Subnet registry + /subnet/[netuid] metagraph shell
items.body:
## Goal
Registry for netuid 1–128 with live/inactive/unknown, plus generic metagraph page per netuid (taoswap-style proxy).

## Acceptance
- `/subnets` list
- `/subnet/[netuid]/metagraph` shows neuron table or honest empty/error
- SN74 linked as first-class hub experience

items.title: hub:wanted — Document PR linked-issue gate for contributors
items.body:
## Goal
Short docs snippet + CONTRIBUTING cross-links explaining the linked-open-issue requirement and max-2-PR rule.

## Acceptance
- Visible from README or docs/github-os.md
- Examples of good vs slop PRs
